case_title: RAYMOND GUZMAN VS. RICHARD E MCGEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO POSTPONE: THIS IS A WAGE CLAIM BY PLAINTIFF; REASON FOR REQUEST FOR POSTPONE IS QUESTIONABLE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-28-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF RAYMOND GUZMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD E. MCGEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEEDS MORE TIME TO PRODUCE RECORDS WITH THE INTENT TO SETTLE THE MATTER AMICABLY OUTSIDE OF COURT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL HEARING DATE CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
